title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF AGTABO IN THE BARRIO OF SALNGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A BARRIO OF   SAID   MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5549 / 53 OG No. 16, 5151 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1734, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF AGTABO IN THE BARRIO OF SALNGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Agtabo in the barrio of Salngan, Municipality of Passi, Province of Iloilo, is converted into a barrio of said municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
